issues.sample: About every 45 days the car will not turn off. Safety items like the rear view camera will not work. The main viewing screen will go dead. I called the dealership. They said this was a common problem with my car. The only fix is to attempt a full system reboot with  a paper clip.

narrative.headline: What 2022 Genesis G90 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (33% of reports).
